title: Feeding 6 Well Plates
author: Andrea Argouarch
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.8gihtue

steps.title: Record observations Biopsy pieces should look...
steps.instruction: Record observations Biopsy pieces should look dense and dark; it will not change morphology Clean and straight edges on the tissue is best Outgrowth will vary between a few days to 2 weeks, depending on biopsy After a week, gently change media and then feed every 2-3 days o Be careful not to move coverslip and to not tilt plate

steps.title: Turn off UV lights and clean hood with 70% ethanol
steps.instruction: Turn off UV lights and clean hood with 70% ethanol

steps.title: Clean items with 70% ethanol and bring into hood a
steps.instruction: Clean items with 70% ethanol and bring into hood a. Sterile Filtered Media with PenStrep DMEM, high glucose, pyruvate Thermo Fisher Catalog #11995073 Penicillin-Streptomycin Gibco - Thermo Fisher Scientific Catalog #15140122 Fetal Bovine Serum VWR International (Avantor) Catalog #97068-091

steps.title: Carefully remove old media with vacuum...
steps.instruction: Carefully remove old media with vacuum line, making sure not to touch the coverslip.

steps.title: Do not tilt plate while feeding...
steps.instruction: Do not tilt plate while feeding to prevent coverslip from sliding

steps.title: Add 3 mls 3 mL of...
steps.instruction: Add 3 mls 3 mL of new media per well, making sure not to touch the coverslip a. Add media slowly b. Make sure the coverslip is still firmly and evenly over the biopsy

steps.title: Gently place 6 well plate in...
steps.instruction: Gently place 6 well plate in incubator (5% CO2, 37 o C) 37 °C

steps.title: Continue to gently feed every 2...
steps.instruction: Continue to gently feed every 2 – 3 days for 3 weeks to allow enough cells to emerge and expand from tissue

steps.title: Clean and sterilize hood with 70%...
steps.instruction: Clean and sterilize hood with 70% ethanol and turn on UV

description: Update cell culture notes in lab notebook
